patterns: admission ke liye kya karna hoga
responses: The admission process at ITM Gwalior involves: 1) Fill online application form at www.itmgwalior.ac.in, 2) Upload required documents, 3) Pay application fee of ₹500, 4) Appear for JEE Mains / RGPV DTE MP counselling (for B.Tech), 5) Attend counselling session, 6) Pay admission fee and confirm seat.
ITM Gwalior offers UG and PG programs. UG: B.Tech (CS, EC, ME, CE) affiliated to RGPV Bhopal, BCA, BBA, B.Sc, B.Com. PG: M.Tech, MCA, MBA, M.Sc. Would you like details about any specific course?

Eligibility varies by course. B.Tech (RGPV affiliated) requires 60% in PCM in 12th + JEE Mains score. BCA requires 55% in 12th with Maths. BBA requires 50% in any stream in 12th. M.Tech requires relevant B.Tech with 60%. MBA requires graduation with 50% + MAT/CAT score. Which course eligibility would you like to know?

Fee structure at ITM Gwalior: B.Tech CS - ₹87,000/year, B.Tech EC/ME/CE - ₹80,000-84,000/year, BCA - ₹48,000/year, BBA - ₹42,000/year, B.Sc - ₹36,000/year, B.Com - ₹32,000/year, M.Tech - ₹92,000/year, MCA - ₹58,000/year, MBA - ₹88,000/year. Scholarships available for merit students!

patterns: form fill karne ki last date
kab tak apply kar sakte hain
responses: Important dates for 2025-26 admissions: Form start date: March 1, 2025. Form last date: May 31, 2025. Entrance exam: June 15, 2025. Result declaration: June 25, 2025. Counselling: July 1-10, 2025. Classes begin: August 1, 2025.

Documents required for admission: 1) 10th Marksheet & Certificate, 2) 12th/Graduation Marksheet & Certificate, 3) Aadhar Card (both sides), 4) Passport size photographs (6 copies), 5) Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable), 6) Migration Certificate, 7) Character Certificate, 8) Income Certificate (for scholarship), 9) Transfer Certificate. All documents must be self-attested.

ITM Gwalior has excellent hostel facilities. Boys Hostel: Capacity 500 students, Fee ₹68,000/year (with mess). Girls Hostel: Capacity 300 students, Fee ₹72,000/year (with mess). Facilities include: 24/7 security, WiFi, hot water, furnished rooms (2-4 sharing), common room, indoor sports, medical room. Contact: hostel@itmgwalior.ac.in

Contact ITM Gwalior: 📞 Phone: +91-751-2970300, +91-9039019301. 📧 Email: info@itmgwalior.ac.in. 🌐 Website: www.itmgwalior.ac.in. 📍 Address: ITM Campus, Turari, NH-75, Gwalior - 474001, Madhya Pradesh. ⏰ Office Hours: Monday-Saturday, 9 AM – 5 PM.

Scholarship opportunities at ITM Gwalior: 1) Merit Scholarship: 50% fee waiver for students with >90% in qualifying exam. 2) EWS Scholarship: 30% fee waiver for economically weaker section (income <2.5L/year). 3) SC/ST Scholarship: Government scholarship + 25% institutional discount. 4) Sports Quota: 20% fee waiver for state/national level athletes. Apply within 30 days of admission.

For B.Tech admissions, ITM Gwalior follows RGPV / DTE MP counselling based on JEE Mains score. Exam Date: June 15, 2025. Duration: 3 hours. Pattern: MCQ (100 questions). Subjects: Physics, Chemistry, Maths. Total Marks: 400. Admit Card release: June 8, 2025. Exam centers: Gwalior, Bhopal, Indore, Jabalpur. Syllabus follows NCERT 11th & 12th standard.

Results & Merit List: Entrance exam result: June 25, 2025. Merit list will be published on www.itmgwalior.ac.in/results. You'll need your roll number and date of birth to check. First merit list: July 1, 2025. Second merit list (if required): July 8, 2025. SMS and email notification will be sent to registered candidates.
